why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before stack-depth decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Button is the seat anchor because the last acting seat converts deep-stack information into the clearest pressure edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start with the button so you know who acts last and can use depth with the biggest informational edge. That seat anchor matters because deep-stack pressure is much stronger when the late-position player controls the final decision.
